overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical beach environment. The character walks along white sand and through shallow turquoise water, passing palm trees and red grass with distant ruined skyscrapers visible across the bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach with red grass patches and driftwood

events.description: character steps from dry sand into shallow ocean water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beach toward the water's edge

entered.detail: tall red grass patches growing on the sandy dunes
massive ruined skyscrapers visible in the misty distance across the bay
small palm-covered island in the turquoise water
weathered wooden logs scattered on the white sand

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright tropical beach with the character walking along white sand. Red grass patches grow on the dunes to the right while distant ruined skyscrapers loom across the bay. The character approaches and steps into the shallow turquoise water, transitioning from sand to sea.

events.description: character turns direction while wading through shallow water, shifting the view of distant landmarks from right to left

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow clear water along the shoreline with gentle waves

entered.detail: rusted metal wreckage and debris partially submerged in the water
gentle waves breaking on the shore

segments.scene_description: The character wades through crystal-clear shallow turquoise water along the beach. Shipwreck debris is visible in the water to the right. As the character turns, the distant skyscrapers shift from the right to the left side of the frame, and palm trees become visible on the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach shoreline with palm trees and breaking waves

events.description: character exits shallow water back onto sandy beach near palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge transitioning from water to dry sand toward palm trees

entered.detail: cluster of tall palm trees with green fronds lining the beach
patch of pink flowering plants growing on the sand dune
dark rocks protruding from the water near the shore

segments.scene_description: The character exits the water onto wet sand, walking along the shoreline toward a grove of palm trees. Breaking waves crash nearby while pink flowers and tropical vegetation appear on the left. The beach curves gently with rocks visible in the water to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm tree grove with dense tropical vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through dense palm tree grove with vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: overhead palm fronds creating dappled shade over the path
tall red grass patches growing among the palm trees on the dunes

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a denser palm tree grove where the canopy creates partial shade. The distant ocean and skyscrapers are now occluded by the dense vegetation. Red grass reappears on the dunes alongside the path as the character continues through the tropical foliage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sun-drenched tropical beach into the shaded seclusion of a dense palm grove. It begins with the character walking across white sand dunes dotted with red grass, moving toward the shoreline where ruined skyscrapers loom across the bay. As the character steps into the crystal-clear turquoise water, the camera pans to reveal shipwreck debris and shifts the distant city skyline to the left while palm trees emerge on the shore. The scene then transitions as the character exits the water onto wet sand, passing crashing waves and pink tropical flowers before turning toward a grove of palms. Finally, the camera moves into the thick canopy where the ocean and skyscrapers are occluded by foliage, returning to the red grass of the dunes under the partial shade of the trees.
